name: Clicker Time
short_description: Clicker Time is a simple and fun clicker game on Steam, where you earn points and unlock Steam achievements by simply tapping the screen!
detailed_description:
Clicker Time is an exciting time-killer clicker game where your goal is to collect as many points as possible and unlock all available achievements!

Simply start clicking on the screen to earn points and unlock achievements.

Game Features:

  • Simple and minimalist design.

  • Easy controls — just click!

  • Amazing sound effects.

  • Save system to continue where you left off.

  • Over 85 unique achievements to unlock.

Clicker Time is a game for everyone who wants to have fun and relax. Keep clicking, beat your records, and prove you're the ultimate clicking master!
